scripts.start: npm --workspace openmemory-js run build && npm --workspace openmemory-js run start
scripts.test: npm --workspace openmemory-js run build && npm --workspace openmemory-js exec -- tsx tests/import_smoke.ts && npm --workspace openmemory-js exec -- tsx tests/omnibus.ts && npm --workspace openmemory-js exec -- tsx tests/project_isolation.ts
